scripts.cap:init: npm install && npx cap add android && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.android:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
